first_blood.title: First Blood
first_blood.flavor: You took your first hit in the City — and gave one back. Survival is a verb here, not a noun.

ghost_hand.title: Ghost Hand
ghost_hand.flavor: You broke contact and walked out of a fight nobody was supposed to walk out of. Couriers will hear about this.

old_hand.title: Old Hand
old_hand.flavor: Five different handles know your face by name. The City has officially logged you.

first_tape.title: First Tape
first_tape.flavor: You picked up your first piece of the City's record. The collection has begun.

tape_hoarder.title: Tape Hoarder
tape_hoarder.flavor: Eight pieces of the City's record. Most people never notice these things exist.

first_run.title: First Run
first_run.flavor: You finished your first delve. The next one will be easier. The next one will not be safer.

patient_cartographer.title: Patient Cartographer
patient_cartographer.flavor: You scouted a section that wasn't on yesterday's map. The City breathes; you noticed.

marrow_owed.title: Marrow Owed
marrow_owed.flavor: Five hundred credits in debt. The clinic has a column for handles like yours, and you're now in it.

shard_bender.title: Shard Bender
shard_bender.flavor: You pushed a plot thread to its third stage. The District is going to remember whose handle was on the wire.

in_with_couriers.title: In with the Couriers
in_with_couriers.flavor: Couriers Guild reputation +3. Rook's people will speak in front of you now. Some of them will even tell you the truth.

in_with_bureau.title: In with the Bureau
in_with_bureau.flavor: Recovery Bureau reputation +3. Voss will not say it but you've stopped being a name in his file and started being a name in his desk drawer.

cartographer.title: Cartographer
cartographer.flavor: You walked every room in the District. Most handles never make it past their own deck. The City has logged your route.

quiet_listener.title: Quiet Listener
quiet_listener.flavor: You read every narrative fragment the City has surrendered so far. Most of what's in your head right now is not supposed to be in anyone's head.
